query: How do I book a service?
context:
- (upload) 03-servicing: Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance Service intervals - Petrol models (Stellare, Vento, Soluna): every 12 months or 15,000 km, whichever comes first. - Electric flagship (Eterna): every 24 months or 30,000 km, whichever comes first. Electric models require less routine maintenance. How to book a service - Book through the Aurelia Owner app, the owner web portal, or by contacting your dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor. - Aurelia offers complimentary collection and delivery of your car within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre. - During service, owners are offered a courtesy Aurelia vehicle on request. Aurelia Care Plan - A prepaid maintenance plan covering all scheduled servicing for 5 years or 75,000 km. - It is transferable with the car and can be purchased at any time within the first 12 months of ownership. Tyres and consumables - Aurelia recommends rotating tyres every 10,000 km. - Only Aurelia-approved tyre specifications should be fitted to preserve the handling balance and the warranty. Software updates (Eterna) - The Eterna receives over-the-air software updates at no charge. - Major feature updates are released approximately twice per year.
- (upload) 05-ownership-faq: Aurelia Motors — Ownership Services & FAQ Aurelia Privilege membership - Every owner automatically receives Aurelia Privilege membership for the life of their ownership. - Benefits include 24/7 concierge, priority service booking, invitations to Aurelia driving events, and access to the owners' lounge at the Modena factory. Roadside assistance - Complimentary 24/7 roadside assistance is included for the duration of the warranty across the country and neighbouring regions. - If your car cannot be repaired the same day, Aurelia arranges alternative luxury transport so your plans are not interrupted. Charging the Aurelia Eterna - The Eterna supports 350 kW DC fast charging: roughly 10-80% in about 22 minutes under ideal conditions. - A home wall-box charger is included with every Eterna; professional installation can be arranged by Aurelia. - The car provides access to a network of premium public charging partners through the Aurelia Owner app. Test drives - Private test drives are arranged by appointment at an Aurelia Atelier. - For serious commissions, a multi-day "Extended Experience" drive can be arranged with a concierge. Frequently asked questions - Q: Can I track my car's build
- (upload) 04-ordering-bespoke: Aurelia Motors — Ordering, Bespoke & Delivery Placing an order - Orders are placed through an Aurelia Atelier (showroom) or with an Aurelia Client Advisor. - A refundable commissioning deposit of 10% secures a build slot. - Typical build time from order confirmation to delivery is 4 to 6 months, depending on bespoke content. Aurelia Bespoke program - Choose from over 200 exterior paint colours, or commission a fully custom colour matched to any sample you provide. - Interior options include hand-stitched leather, sustainable wool, real wood and carbon-fibre veneers, and personalised embroidery. - Owners may add a unique commissioning plaque with their name or a personal inscription. Delivery experience - Standard delivery takes place at your nearest Aurelia Atelier with a personal handover and feature walkthrough. - "Atelier Collection" allows owners to collect the car at the Modena factory, including a tour and lunch with the build team. - Home delivery anywhere in the country is available on request. Changing or cancelling an order - Specification changes are possible until the car enters the paint stage. - The commissioning deposit is fully refundable if cancelled before product
- (upload) 02-warranty: Aurelia Motors — Warranty & Coverage New Vehicle Warranty - Every new Aurelia is covered by a 4-year / unlimited-mileage warranty. - Coverage starts on the date of delivery to the first owner. - The warranty is fully transferable to subsequent owners at no cost, which helps preserve resale value. Battery Warranty (Aurelia Eterna) - The high-voltage battery is covered for 8 years or 160,000 km, whichever comes first. - Aurelia guarantees the battery will retain at least 70% of its original usable capacity during the warranty period; otherwise it is repaired or replaced at no charge. Paint & Corrosion - Bespoke paint finishes are warranted for 4 years against defects. - The body structure is warranted against perforation from corrosion for 12 years. What is NOT covered - Normal wear items: tyres, brake pads and discs, wiper blades, and clutch friction surfaces. - Damage from accidents, misuse, track use, or unauthorised modifications. - Maintenance performed outside the Aurelia Authorised Service network. Extended Care - Owners may purchase "Aurelia Extended Care" to add up to 4 additional years of coverage. It must be activated before the original warranty expires. - Extended Care i
response:
You can book a service in any of these ways:

- through the **Aurelia Owner app**
- via the **owner web portal**
- by contacting your **dedicated Aurelia Client Advisor**

Aurelia also offers **complimentary collection and delivery within 100 km of any Authorised Service Centre**, and a **courtesy Aurelia vehicle** can be provided on request during servicing. (Aurelia Motors — Servicing & Maintenance)

If you’d like, I can also help you with the recommended service interval for your specific Aurelia model.
